name: python3-jaraco.context
title: python3-jaraco.context
description:
jaraco contextlib extensions
Various context managers extending functionality of Python's
contextlib, mostly needed as a dependency of other projects
involving the same upstream developer.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jaraco.context because jaraco contextlib extensions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jaraco.context as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jaraco.context with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jaraco.context --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
